name: UBA : User Access from Multiple Locations
notes: Detects when a username is being used in multiple locations simultaneously.
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username and different Source Geographic Country/Region in 15 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username and different Source Geographic Country/Region in 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Access from Multiple Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username and different Source Geographic Country/Region in 15 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Access from Multiple Locations
Event description: senseValue=5,senseDesc='Indicates that the same user account is being used from multiple locations/sources simultaneously',usecase_id='9cafdd9d-72a4-4d23-9a53-0273cbccfcd0'
